message.content:
@startuml
participant "CShareMoreDlg" as CSDlg
participant "CSharingMoreWrapper" as CSWrp
participant "CPfwMainFrame" as PMFrm
participant "CPfwChainMessageMapT<...>" as PCMMpT
participant "CMCUIMgr" as MUIMgr
participant "CSmDefUIMgr" as SDUMgr
participant "CPfwMessageCenterAgent" as PMCntrAgt
participant "CSmfITUiMgr" as SMfUITMgrr
participant "CMCFiTUiMgr" as MCFTiTMgrr
participant "CSmAppShareSessionMgr" as SASSNMgrr
participant "CPcmAppShareMgr" as PASMgrr

note over CSDlg : User Click \"Other Application\" 
activate CSDlg
  ->> CSWrp   : ShareOtherApp()  
    activate CSWrp    
      -->+PMFrm     : SendMessage(PFW_QS_MENU_SHARE_OTHER_APP_ID)      
        note right of PMFrm:PFW_QS_MENU_SHARE_OTHER_APP_ID        
          activate PMFrm          
            ---->>PCMMpT       : PfwinProcessWindowMessage(...)            
              activate PCMMpT              
                <<--++-PMCntrAgt         : ProcessWindowMessage(WM_USER,...)                
                  deactivate PCMMpT                  
                    -->>SMfUITMgrr           : OnWindowMsg( WM_COMMAND ,...)                    
                      activate SMfUITMgrr                      
                        --->>+MCFTiTMgrr             : ChainToMsgCenter(MSG_CENTER_CMD_SELECT_ANOTHER_APPLICATION_TO_SHARE )                              
                          loop                                
                            <--+-MCFTiTMgrr                               ::OnCommand(...MSG_CENTER_CMD_ SELECT_ANOTHER_APPLICATION_TO_SHARE ...)                            
                              <-<-MCFTiTMgrr                             ::SelectANewApplication ()                          
                                end                        
                                  -[hidden]right->PASMgrr                           : ShowInstalledAppDialog (...)                         
                                    activate PASMgrr                       
                                      deactivate MCFTiTMgrr                     
                                        deactivate SMfUITMgrr                   
                                          deactivate PMCntrAgt                 
                                            deactivate PMFrm               
                                              deactivate CSWrp             
                                                deactivate CSDlg           
@enduml
